fields.name: input
fields.description:
Input (or inputs) to classify. Can be a single string, an array of strings, or
an array of multi-modal input objects similar to other models.

fields.name: model
fields.description:
The content moderation model you would like to use. Learn more in
[the moderation guide](/docs/guides/moderation), and learn about
available models [here](/docs/models#moderation).

types.name: CreateModerationRequestInput
types.description:
Input (or inputs) to classify. Can be a single string, an array of strings, or
an array of multi-modal input objects similar to other models.

types.name: CreateModerationRequestInputArrayItemImageUrl

fields.name: type
fields.description: Always `image_url`.

fields.name: image_url
fields.description: Contains either an image URL or a data URL for a base64 encoded image.

types.description: An object describing an image to classify.

types.name: CreateModerationRequestInputArrayItemImageUrlImageUrl

fields.name: url
fields.description: Either a URL of the image or the base64 encoded image data.

types.description: Contains either an image URL or a data URL for a base64 encoded image.

types.name: CreateModerationRequestInputArrayItemText

fields.name: type
fields.description: Always `text`.

fields.name: text
fields.description: A string of text to classify.

types.description: An object describing text to classify.

types.name: CreateModerationRequestModel
types.description:
The content moderation model you would like to use. Learn more in
[the moderation guide](/docs/guides/moderation), and learn about
available models [here](/docs/models#moderation).

types.name: CreateModerationResponse

fields.name: id
fields.description: The unique identifier for the moderation request.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The model used to generate the moderation results.

fields.name: results
fields.description: A list of moderation objects.

types.description: Represents if a given text input is potentially harmful.

fields.name: flagged
fields.description: Whether any of the below categories are flagged.

fields.name: categories
fields.description: A list of the categories, and whether they are flagged or not.

fields.name: category_scores
fields.description: A list of the categories along with their scores as predicted by model.

fields.name: category_applied_input_types
fields.description: A list of the categories along with the input type(s) that the score applies to.

types.name: CreateModerationResponseResultsItemCategories

fields.name: hate
fields.description: Content that expresses, incites, or promotes hate based on race, gender, ethnicity, religion, nationality, sexual orientation, disability status, or caste. Hateful content aimed at non-protected groups (e.g., chess players) is harassment.

fields.name: hate/threatening
fields.description: Hateful content that also includes violence or serious harm towards the targeted group based on race, gender, ethnicity, religion, nationality, sexual orientation, disability status, or caste.

fields.name: harassment
fields.description: Content that expresses, incites, or promotes harassing language towards any target.

fields.name: harassment/threatening
fields.description: Harassment content that also includes violence or serious harm towards any target.

fields.name: self-harm
fields.description: Content that promotes, encourages, or depicts acts of self-harm, such as suicide, cutting, and eating disorders.

fields.name: self-harm/intent
fields.description: Content where the speaker expresses that they are engaging or intend to engage in acts of self-harm, such as suicide, cutting, and eating disorders.

fields.name: self-harm/instructions
fields.description: Content that encourages performing acts of self-harm, such as suicide, cutting, and eating disorders, or that gives instructions or advice on how to commit such acts.

fields.name: sexual
fields.description: Content meant to arouse sexual excitement, such as the description of sexual activity, or that promotes sexual services (excluding sex education and wellness).

fields.name: sexual/minors
fields.description: Sexual content that includes an individual who is under 18 years old.

fields.name: violence
fields.description: Content that depicts death, violence, or physical injury.

fields.name: violence/graphic
fields.description: Content that depicts death, violence, or physical injury in graphic detail.

types.description: A list of the categories, and whether they are flagged or not.

types.name: CreateModerationResponseResultsItemCategoryScores

fields.name: hate
fields.description: The score for the category 'hate'.

fields.name: hate/threatening
fields.description: The score for the category 'hate/threatening'.

fields.name: harassment
fields.description: The score for the category 'harassment'.

fields.name: harassment/threatening
fields.description: The score for the category 'harassment/threatening'.

fields.name: illicit
fields.description: The score for the category 'illicit'.

fields.name: illicit/violent
fields.description: The score for the category 'illicit/violent'.

fields.name: self-harm
fields.description: The score for the category 'self-harm'.

fields.name: self-harm/intent
fields.description: The score for the category 'self-harm/intent'.

fields.name: self-harm/instructions
fields.description: The score for the category 'self-harm/instructions'.

fields.name: sexual
fields.description: The score for the category 'sexual'.

fields.name: sexual/minors
fields.description: The score for the category 'sexual/minors'.

fields.name: violence
fields.description: The score for the category 'violence'.

fields.name: violence/graphic
fields.description: The score for the category 'violence/graphic'.

types.description: A list of the categories along with their scores as predicted by model.

methods.description:
Classifies if text and/or image inputs are potentially harmful. Learn
more in the [moderation guide](/docs/guides/moderation).
